title: Official Launch with Claude 3.7 Sonnet
description: Claude Code officially launched on February 24, 2025, alongside Claude 3.7 Sonnet, expanding from research preview to broader audience beyond solo developers. Terminal-based agentic coding tool that can parse million-line codebases, generate code across multiple files, and run Shell/Git/test commands.

community_feedback.quote: Currently the strongest agentic coding tool
3-5x development speed improvements reported by users
Like a very smart but extremely impulsive intern - can write amazing code but confidently submit disastrous bugs
Controlling it can be more exhausting than writing code yourself
Don't let it edit 7-8 files at once - initial code may look perfect but creates maintenance disasters
community_feedback.source: Best practices shared by heavy users

community_feedback.quote: Use planning mode first to get architectural analysis before implementation

title: Multi-Model Strategy with Claude and Gemini
description: GitHub CEO Thomas Dohmke announced Copilot is integrating Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Anthropic) and Gemini 1.5 Pro (Google), moving beyond exclusive reliance on OpenAI's GPT models to provide developers with more model choices.

title: Copilot Vision Feature
description: GitHub announced 'Vision' feature in VS Code (v1.98) allowing users to attach screenshots, photos, or diagrams in chat for Copilot to generate corresponding user interfaces, code, and alt text based on visual inputs.

community_feedback.quote: Users may spend over 50% of their coding time verifying AI-generated suggestions, increasing cognitive load

community_feedback.source: Academic study on AI coding assistants
